Package i5.cb.telos.frame

Class ImmutableList

  • java.lang.Object
    • i5.ShallowCloneable
      • i5.cb.telos.frame.ShallowCloneableNode
        • i5.cb.telos.frame.ImmutableList
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    AST_Node, java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Cloneable
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    AttrCategories, ObjectNames, Properties, Qualifiers, WithSpec

    public abstract class ImmutableList
extends ShallowCloneableNode
    Helper class to handle immutable lists of AST nodes.
    (immutable)
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

      • writeTelos

        protected void writeTelos​(java.io.DataOutputStream os,
                          java.lang.String _separator)
                   throws java.io.IOException
        writes the text representation of 'this' in 'Plain Aachen' syntax.
        Parameters:
        os - the OutputStream to write into
        _separator - a string that separates the list items
